register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register a new account
register.termsAccept: By registering, you accept our terms of service
register.successMessage: Account created successfully! Please check your email to verify your account.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with this email exists, you will receive a password reset link shortly.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

emailVerification.title: Email verification
emailVerification.subtitle: Verifying your email address...
emailVerification.successMessage: Your email address has been verified successfully. You can now sign in.
emailVerification.errorMessage: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
emailVerification.alreadyVerified: Email already verified. You can sign in.

logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
logout.logoutAllDescription: This will sign you out from all devices where you are currently signed in.

registerSuccess.title: Check your inbox
registerSuccess.message: We sent a verification email. Click the link in the email to activate your account.

errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address before signing in.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.tokenExpired: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.tokenAlreadyRevoked: This link has already been used.
errors.accountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support.
